4.question_en: A and B can do a certain work in 27 days and 36 days, respectively. A worked for a few days, and then B joined him. They worked together till the completion of the work. If the work got completed in a total of 18 days, then for how many days did A and B work together?
4.question_hi: A और B एक निश्चित कार्य को क्रमशः 27 दिनों और 36 दिनों में पूरा कर सकते हैं। A ने कुछ दिनों तक कार्य किया, और फिर B भी उसके साथ जुड़ गया। कार्य पूरा होने तक उन्होंने साथ मिलकर कार्य किया। यदि कार्य कुल 18 दिनों में पूरा हुआ, तो A और B ने कितने दिनों तक साथ मिलकर कार्य किया?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 12.

LCM(27, 36) = 108

The efficiency of A = 108/27 = 4 units

The efficiency of B = 108/36 = 3 units

Let A work for n days

A and B worked for (18 - n) days

⇒ 4n + 7(18 - n) = 108

⇒ 4n + 126 - 7n = 108

⇒ 3n = 18

⇒ n = 6

So, A and B worked together = 18 – 6 = 12 days
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 12 है।

लघुत्तम समापवर्त्य (27, 36) = 108

A की दक्षता = 108/27 = 4 इकाई

B की दक्षता = 108/36 = 3 इकाई

मान लीजिए A ने n दिन काम किया

A और B ने (18 - n) दिन काम किया

⇒ 4n + 7(18 - n) = 108

⇒ 4n + 126 - 7n = 108

⇒ 3n = 18

⇒ n = 6

अतः, A और B ने मिलकर काम किया = 18 - 6 = 12 दिन

4.question_en: If a seven-digit number 53345xy is divisible by 40, for some possible values of x and y, then the one value of (2x - 5y) is:
4.question_hi: यदि सात अंकों की संख्या 53345xy, x और y के कुछ संभावित मानों के लिए, 40 से विभाज्य है, तो (2x-5y) का एक मान क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. 12.

40 = 5 × 8

Divisibility rule of 5: the last digit should be 5 or 0

to make divisible by 5 as well as 8 last digit must be 0

so, y = 0

Divisibility rule of 8: the last three digits are divisible by 8

last 3 digits = 5x0

x = 2, 6

So, (2x - 5y) = (2 × 6 - 5 × 0) = 12
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात 12 है।

40 = 5 × 8

5 का विभाज्यता नियम: अंतिम अंक 5 या 0 होना चाहिए

5 और 8 दोनों से विभाज्य होने के लिए, अंतिम अंक 0 होना चाहिए

अतः, y = 0

8 का विभाज्यता नियम: अंतिम तीन अंक 8 से विभाज्य हैं

अंतिम 3 अंक = 5x0

x = 2, 6

अतः, (2x - 5y) = (2 × 6 - 5 × 0) = 12

4.question_en:
Simplify the given expression:

\(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over a^3 + x^3} \times {a^2-ax+x^2 \over a^2x^2 + x^4}) \div {(a^2-2ax+x^2) (a - x) \over (a^4 - x^4)}, a \neq x\)
4.question_hi:
दिए गए व्यंजक को सरल कीजिए:

\(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over a^3 + x^3} \times {a^2-ax+x^2 \over a^2x^2 + x^4}) \div {(a^2-2ax+x^2) (a - x) \over (a^4 - x^4)}, a \neq x\)
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. \({a + x \over a - x}\).

\(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over a^3 + x^3} \times {a^2-ax+x^2 \over a^2x^2 + x^4}) \div {(a^2-2ax+x^2) (a - x) \over (a^4 - x^4)}\)

⇒ \(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over (a+x)(a^2+x^2-ax)} \times {(a^2-ax+x^2) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)}) \div {(a-x)^2(a-x)\over (a-x)(a+x)(a^2+x^2)}\)

⇒ \( {(ax^2-x^3) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)} \div {(a-x)^2\over(a+x)(a^2+x^2)}\)

⇒​​​​​​​ \( {(ax^2-x^3) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)} \times {(a+x)(a^2+x^2)\over(a-x)^2}\)

⇒​​​​​​​ \( {x^2(a-x) \over x^2} \times {(a+x)\over(a-x)^2}\) = \({(a+x)\over(a-x)}\)
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात \({a + x \over a - x}\) है।

\(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over a^3 + x^3} \times {a^2-ax+x^2 \over a^2x^2 + x^4}) \div {(a^2-2ax+x^2) (a - x) \over (a^4 - x^4)}\)

⇒ \(({(a+x) (ax^2-x^3) \over (a+x)(a^2+x^2-ax)} \times {(a^2-ax+x^2) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)}) \div {(a-x)^2(a-x)\over (a-x)(a+x)(a^2+x^2)}\)

⇒ \( {(ax^2-x^3) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)} \div {(a-x)^2\over(a+x)(a^2+x^2)}\)

⇒ \( {(ax^2-x^3) \over x^2(a^2 + x^2)} \times {(a+x)(a^2+x^2)\over(a-x)^2}\)

⇒​​​​​​​ \( {x^2(a-x) \over x^2} \times {(a+x)\over(a-x)^2}\) = \({(a+x)\over(a-x)}\)

4.question_en: A shopkeeper gains 20% when he sells an article at a 20% discount on its market price. If the cost price of the article is reduced by 20% and he wants to earn a profit of 26%, then how much percent discount should he give on the same marked price of the article?
4.question_hi: एक दुकानदार को एक वस्तु को उसके बाजार मूल्य पर 20% की छूट पर बेचने पर 20% का लाभ होता है। यदि वस्तु का क्रय मूल्य 20% कम कर दिया जाए और वह 26% का लाभ कमाना चाहता है, तो उसे वस्तु के समान अंकित मूल्य पर कितने प्रतिशत की छूट देनी चाहिए?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. 32.8%.

Let MP = 100

20% discount: SP = 80

Profit 20%: CP = \(80\over1.2\) = \(200\over3\)

New CP = \(200\over3\) × \(80\over100\) = \(160\over3\)

Required profit = 26%

New SP = \(160\over3\) × \(126\over100\) = 67.20

Discount = 100 - 67.20 = 32.8%
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 अर्थात 32.8% है।

मान लीजिए कि अंकित मूल्य = 100

20% छूट: विक्रय मूल्य = 80

लाभ 20%: क्रय मूल्य = \(80\over1.2\) = \(200\over3\)

नया क्रय मूल्य = \(200\over3\) × \(80\over100\) = \(160\over3\)

आवश्यक लाभ = 26%

नया विक्रय मूल्य = \(160\over3\) × \(126\over100\) = 67.20

छूट = 100 - 67.20 = 32.8%

4.question_en: The income of A is 25% more than that of B, and B’s income is 20% more than that of C. D’s income is 60% of the combined income of B and C. Which of the following is true?
4.question_hi: A की आय B से 25% अधिक है, और B की आय C से 20% अधिक है। D की आय B और C की संयुक्त आय का 60% है। निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा सत्य है?
4.option_en_1: The income of C is 32% less than that of D.
4.option_en_2: The income of D is 12% less than that of A.
4.option_en_3: The income of B is 12% less than that of D.
4.option_en_4: The income of C is 50% less than that of A.
4.option_hi_1: C की आय D की तुलना में 32% कम है।
4.option_hi_2: D की आय A की तुलना में 12% कम है।
4.option_hi_3: B की आय D की तुलना में 12% कम है।
4.option_hi_4: C की आय A की तुलना में 50% कम है।
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. The income of D is 12% less than that of A.

Let C = 100

B = 100 + 20% = 120

A = 120 + 25% = 150

B + C = 120 + 100 = 220

D = 60% of 220 = 132

Option 2:

A = 150, D = 132

% less = \((150 - 132)\over150\) × 100 = 18/150 × 100 = 12%
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 अर्थात D की आय A की तुलना में 12% कम है है।

​मान लीजिए C = 100

B = 100 + 20% = 120

A = 120 + 25% = 150

B + C = 120 + 100 = 220

D = 220 का 60% = 132

विकल्प 2:

A = 150, D = 132

% कम = \((150 - 132)\over150\) × 100 = 18/150 × 100 = 12%

4.question_en: The ratio of acid and water in solutions A and B is 15 : 11 and 4 : 9, respectively. 6 litres of A is mixed with 4 litres of B. How much acid (in ml) should be added to 390 ml of the resulting solution so that the ratio of acid and water in it becomes 3 : 2?
4.question_hi: विलयन A और B में अम्ल और पानी का अनुपात क्रमशः 15:11 और 4:9 है। 6 लीटर A को 4 लीटर B के साथ मिलाया जाता है। परिणामी विलयन के 390 मिलीलीटर में कितना अम्ल (मिलीलीटर में) मिलाया जाना चाहिए ताकि इसमें अम्ल और पानी का अनुपात 3:2 हो जाए?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 127.5.

A = 15 : 11

Total = 26

Acid in 6L = \(15\over26\) × 6000 = 3461.54

Water = 6000 - 3461.54 = 2538.46

B = 4 : 9

Total = 13

Acid in 4L = \(4\over13\) × 4000 = 1230.77

Water = 4000 - 1230.77 = 2769.23

Total Acid = 3461.54 + 1230.77 = 4692.31

Total Water = 2538.46 + 2769.23 = 5307.69

Total = 10000 ml

390 ml sample:

Acid = \(4692.31\over10000\) × 390 = 183

Water = 207

Let the quantity of acid added be x

\((183 + x)\over207\) = \(3\over2\)

⇒ 2(183 + x) = 621

⇒ 366 + 2x = 621

⇒ 2x = 255

⇒ x = 127.5
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 127.5 है।

A = 15 : 11

कुल = 26

6 लीटर में अम्ल = \(15\over26\) × 6000 = 3461.54

पानी = 6000 - 3461.54 = 2538.46

B = 4 : 9

कुल = 13

4 लीटर में अम्ल = \(4\over13\) × 4000 = 1230.77

पानी = 4000 - 1230.77 = 2769.23

कुल अम्ल = 3461.54 + 1230.77 = 4692.31

कुल पानी = 2538.46 + 2769.23 = 5307.69

कुल = 10000 मिली

390 मिली नमूना:

अम्ल = \(4692.31\over10000\) × 390 = 183

पानी = 207

मान लीजिए कि मिलाए गए अम्ल की मात्रा x है

\((183 + x)\over207\) = \(3\over2\)

⇒ 2(183 + x) = 621

⇒ 366 + 2x = 621

⇒ 2x = 255

⇒ x = 127.5

4.question_en:
Study the given graph and answer the following questions.

What is the ratio of the production of wheat in 2015 and 2017 to the total production of rice and barley in 2016?
4.question_hi:
दिए गए ग्राफ का अध्ययन कीजिए और निम्नलिखित प्रश्नों के उत्तर दीजिए।

2015 और 2017 में गेहूँ के उत्पादन का 2016 में चावल और जौ के कुल उत्पादन से अनुपात क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 6 : 5.

The total production of wheat in 2015 and 2017 = 350 + 550 = 900

The total production of rice and barley in 2016 = 300 + 450 = 750

Required ratio = 900 : 750 = 6 : 5
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 6 : 5 है।

2015 और 2017 में गेहूँ का कुल उत्पादन = 350 + 550 = 900

2016 में चावल और जौ का कुल उत्पादन = 300 + 450 = 750

आवश्यक अनुपात = 900 : 750 = 6 : 5

4.question_en: P and Q travel a distance of 120 km such that the speed of P is faster than Q. The sum of their speeds is 75 km/h, and together they took a total time of 6 hours and 40 minutes. Then the speed of Q (in km/h) is:
4.question_hi: P और Q 120 किमी की दूरी इस प्रकार तय करते हैं कि P की गति Q से तेज़ है। उनकी गतियों का योग 75 किमी/घंटा है और दोनों ने मिलकर कुल 6 घंटे 40 मिनट का समय लिया। तो Q की गति (किमी/घंटा में) क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 3 i.e. 30.

Let Q's speed = x

P's speed = 75 - x

Time = 6 hr 40 min = \(\frac{20}{3}\)

According to the question,

⇒ \(\frac{120}{x} + \frac{120}{75 - x} = \frac{20}{3}\)

⇒ \(\frac{360}{x} + \frac{360}{75 - x} = 20\)

⇒ 360(75−x) + 360x = 20x(75−x)

⇒​​​​​​​ 27000 − 360x + 360x = 1500x − 20x2

⇒​​​​​​​ 27000 = 1500x − 20x2

⇒​​​​​​​ x2 − 75x + 1350 = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x2 - 45x - 30x + 1350 = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x(x - 45) - 30(x - 45) = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ (x - 45)(x - 30) = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x = 45, 30

The speed of Q = 30 km/hr
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 3 अर्थात 30 है।

मान लीजिए Q की गति = x

P की गति = 75 - x

समय = 6 घंटे 40 मिनट = \(\frac{20}{3}\)

प्रश्ननुसार,

 ⇒ \(\frac{120}{x} + \frac{120}{75 - x} = \frac{20}{3}\)

⇒ \(\frac{360}{x} + \frac{360}{75 - x} = 20\)

⇒ 360(75−x) + 360x = 20x(75−x)

⇒​​​​​​​ 27000 − 360x + 360x = 1500x − 20x2

⇒​​​​​​​ 27000 = 1500x − 20x2

⇒​​​​​​​ x2 − 75x + 1350 = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x2 - 45x - 30x + 1350 = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x(x - 45) - 30(x - 45) = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ (x - 45)(x - 30) = 0

⇒​​​​​​​ x = 45, 30

Q की गति = 30 किमी/घंटा

4.question_en: A person travels equal distances at speeds of 2 km/h, 4 km/h, 5km/h, 7km/h, and 12 km/h, and takes a total of 1485 minutes. What is the total distance (in km) travelled (to the nearest integer)?
4.question_hi: एक व्यक्ति 2 किमी/घंटा, 4 किमी/घंटा, 5 किमी/घंटा, 7 किमी/घंटा और 12 किमी/घंटा की गति से समान दूरी तय करता है।
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 3 i.e. 105.

Let the equal distance = d km

Total time taken = (\(\frac{d}{2} + \frac{d}{4} + \frac{d}{5} + \frac{d}{7} + \frac{d}{12}\))

Take LCM of 2, 4, 5, 7, 12 = 420

So,

Total time = \(d\left( \frac{1}{2} + \frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{5} + \frac{1}{7} + \frac{1}{12} \right)\) = \(d \left( \frac{210 + 105 + 84 + 60 + 35}{420} \right)\) = \(d \left( \frac{494}{420} \right)\)

According to the question,

⇒ \(\frac{494d}{420}\) = \(1485\over60\)

⇒ d = 21 km approx

Total distance = 21 × 5 = 105 km
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 3 अर्थात 105 है।

मान लीजिए समान दूरी = d किमी

कुल समय = (\(\frac{d}{2} + \frac{d}{4} + \frac{d}{5} + \frac{d}{7} + \frac{d}{12}\))

2, 4, 5, 7, 12 का लघुत्तम समापवर्त्य = 420 लें

अतः,

कुल समय = \(d\left( \frac{1}{2} + \frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{5} + \frac{1}{7} + \frac{1}{12} \right)\) = \(d \left( \frac{210 + 105 + 84 + 60 + 35}{420} \right)\) = \(d \left( \frac{494}{420} \right)\)

प्रश्ननुसार,

⇒ \(\frac{494d}{420}\) = \(1485\over60\)

⇒ d = 21 किमी लगभग

कुल दूरी = 21 × 5 = 105 किमी

4.question_en: When an article is sold for ₹948, there is a loss of 21%. To gain 23%, it should be sold at (in₹):
4.question_hi: जब एक वस्तु ₹948 में बेची जाती है, तो 21% की हानि होती है। 23% लाभ प्राप्त करने के लिए, इसे (₹ में) मूल्य पर बेचा जाना चाहिए:
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 1,476.

Cost price(CP) = \(948\times100\over100-21\) = \(948\times100\over79\) = ₹1200

To gain 23%, Selling Price = 1200 × \(123\over100\) = 12 × 123 = ₹1,476
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 1,476 है।

​क्रय मूल्य (CP) = \(948\times100\over100-21\) = \(948\times100\over79\) = ₹1200

23% लाभ के लिए, विक्रय मूल्य = 1200 × \(123\over100\) = 12 × 123 = ₹1,476

4.question_en: Seven years ago, the ratio of the ages of A and B was 2 : 7. The ratio of their present ages is 3 : 8. What will be the ratio of the ages of A and B, four years from now?
4.question_hi: सात वर्ष पहले, A और B की आयु का अनुपात 2 : 7 था। उनकी वर्तमान आयु का अनुपात 3 : 8 है। अब से चार वर्ष बाद, A और B की आयु का अनुपात क्या होगा?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 5 : 12.

According to the question,

⇒ \({2x+7\over7x+7}={3\over8}\)

⇒ 8(2x + 7) = 3(7x + 7)

⇒ 16x + 56 = 21x + 21

⇒ 5x = 35

⇒ x = 7

Age of A after 4 years = 3x + 4 = 21 + 4 = 25 years

Age of B after 4 years = 8x + 4 = 56 + 4 = 60 years

Required ratio = 25 : 60 = 5 : 12
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 5 : 12 है।

​प्रश्ननुसार,

⇒ \({2x+7\over7x+7}={3\over8}\)

⇒ 8(2x + 7) = 3(7x + 7)

⇒ 16x + 56 = 21x + 21

⇒ 5x = 35

⇒ x = 7

4 वर्ष बाद A की आयु = 3x + 4 = 21 + 4 = 25 वर्ष

4 वर्ष बाद B की आयु = 8x + 4 = 56 + 4 = 60 वर्ष

आवश्यक अनुपात = 25 : 60 = 5 : 12

4.question_en: In △ABC, D and E are the points on sides AB and BC, respectively, such that DE || AC. If BD = 3 cm and AD = 4 cm, then \({Area of \Delta BDE \over Area of quadrilateral ADEC} = {p \over q}\) , where p, q are coprime. What is the value of |p - q|?
4.question_hi: △ABC में, D और E क्रमशः भुजाओं AB और BC पर स्थित बिंदु हैं, जिससे DE || AC है। यदि BD = 3 सेमी और AD = 4 सेमी है, तो △ का क्षेत्रफल/चतुर्भुज ADEB  का क्षेत्रफल  = \({p \over q}\) है, जहाँ p, q सहअभाज्य हैं। |p - q| का मान क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. 31.

△BDE ~ △ABC

⇒ \({BD^2\over AB^2}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

⇒ \({3^2\over(3+4)^2}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

⇒ \({9\over49}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

Area of quadrilateral ADEC = area of △ABC - area of △BDE

Area of quadrilateral ADEC = 49 - 9 = 40

According to the question,

⇒ \({Area of \Delta BDE \over Area of quadrilateral ADEC} = {p \over q} = {9\over40}\) 

Value of |p - q| = |9 - 40| = 31
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 अर्थात 31 है।

△BDE ~ △ABC

⇒ \({BD^2\over AB^2}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

⇒ \({3^2\over(3+4)^2}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

⇒ \({9\over49}={ar△BDE\over ar△ABC}\)

चतुर्भुज ADEC का क्षेत्रफल = △ABC का क्षेत्रफल - △BDE का क्षेत्रफल

चतुर्भुज ADEC का क्षेत्रफल = 49 - 9 = 40

प्रश्न के अनुसार,

⇒ △BDE का क्षेत्रफल/चतुर्भुज ADEC के क्षेत्रफल = \({p \over q} = {9\over40}\)

|p - q| का मान = |9 - 40| = 31

4.question_en:
The given pie chart shows the degree-wise breakdown of the expenditure of a family in a month. The total expenditure of the family is ₹43,200.

By what percentage is the expenditure on education and rent taken together more than the expenditure on food (correct to two decimal places)?
4.question_hi:
दिया गया पाई चार्ट एक परिवार के एक महीने के खर्च का डिग्री-वार विभाजन दर्शाता है। परिवार का कुल खर्च ₹43,200 है।

शिक्षा और किराए पर व्यय, भोजन पर व्यय से कितने प्रतिशत अधिक है (दशमलव के बाद दो स्थानों तक सही)?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 23.81%.

Total degrees in a circle = 360°

So, each degree represents = \(43200\over360\) = ₹120 per degree

Expenditure on education = 60 × 120 = 7200

Expenditure on rent = 70 × 120 = 8400

Expenditure on food = 105 × 120 = 12600

Total of education and rent = 7200 + 8400 = 15600

Required percentage = \({(15600-12600)\over12600}\times100\) = 23.81%
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 23.81% है।

​एक वृत्त में कुल अंश = 360°

अतः, प्रत्येक अंश = \(43200\over360\) = ₹120 प्रति अंश दर्शाता है

शिक्षा पर व्यय = 60 × 120 = 7200

किराए पर व्यय = 70 × 120 = 8400

भोजन पर व्यय = 105 × 120 = 12600

शिक्षा और किराए का योग = 7200 + 8400 = 15600

आवश्यक प्रतिशत = \({(15600-12600)\over12600}\times100\) = 23.81%

4.question_en:
The given bar graph shows the income and expenditure (in ₹ crores) of a company during 5 years (2014 to 2018).

In which year is the ratio of income to expenditure the lowest and highest, respectively?
4.question_hi:
दिया गया बार ग्राफ 5 वर्षों (2014 से 2018) के दौरान एक कंपनी की आय और व्यय (करोड़ रुपये में) दर्शाता है।

किस वर्ष में आय और व्यय का अनुपात क्रमशः सबसे कम और सबसे अधिक है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 2018, 2014.

Income : Expenditure

Ratio in 2014: \(225\over175\) = 1.28

Ratio in 2015: \(280\over250\) = 1.12

Ratio in 2016: \(325\over275\) = 1.182

Ratio in 2017: \(350\over300\) = 1.167

Ratio in 2018: \(350\over325\) = 1.107

Lowest ratio: 2018

Highest ratio: 2014
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 2018, 2014 है।

आय : व्यय

2014 में अनुपात: \(225\over175\) = 1.28

2015 में अनुपात: \(280\over250\) = 1.12

2016 में अनुपात: \(325\over275\) = 1.182

2017 में अनुपात: \(350\over300\) = 1.167

2018 में अनुपात: \(350\over325\) = 1.107

सबसे कम अनुपात: 2018

सबसे ज़्यादा अनुपात: 2014

4.question_en: The average runs scored by Sumit in the first 3 matches is 122. In the 4th match, he scored some runs such so his average runs now become 130. In the 5th match, he scored 14 fewer runs than those in the 4th match, and now the average of his last 4 matches becomes 164. The runs scored by Sumit in the 1st match are:
4.question_hi: पहले 3 मैचों में सुमित द्वारा बनाए गए औसत रन 122 हैं। चौथे मैच में, उन्होंने कुछ रन ऐसे बनाए कि अब उनके औसत रन 130 हो गए। 5वें मैच में, उन्होंने चौथे मैच की तुलना में 14 रन कम बनाए, और अब उनके अंतिम 4 मैचों का औसत 164 हो गया। पहले मैच में सुमित द्वारा बनाए गए रन हैं:
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 4.

Sum of 1st 3 matches = 122 × 3 = 366

4th match = 520 – 366 = 154

5th match = 154 – 14 = 140

Sum of 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th = 164 × 4 = 656

2nd + 3rd = 656 – 154 – 140 = 362

1st match = 366 – 362 = 4 runs
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 4 है।

पहले 3 मैचों का योग = 122 × 3 = 366

चौथा मैच = 520 – 366 = 154

पाँचवाँ मैच = 154 – 14 = 140

दूसरे, तीसरे, चौथे, पाँचवें मैचों का योग = 164 × 4 = 656

दूसरा + तीसरा = 656 – 154 – 140 = 362

पहला मैच = 366 – 362 = 4 रन

4.question_en: What will be the cost of polishing the curved surface area of a solid cylinder at a rate of ₹28 per sq m, if it has a diameter of 70 cm and a height of 7 m? (Use \(\pi ={22 \over 7}\))
4.question_hi: एक ठोस बेलन के वक्र पृष्ठीय क्षेत्रफल को ₹28 प्रति वर्ग मीटर की दर से चमकाने की लागत क्या होगी, यदि इसका व्यास 70 सेमी और ऊँचाई 7 मीटर है? (\(\pi ={22 \over 7}\) का प्रयोग करें)
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. ₹431.20.

Diameter = 70 cm = 0.7 m

Radius = \(0.7\over2\) = 0.35 m

Height = 7 m

Curved Surface Area (CSA) = 2 × \(22\over7\) × 0.35 × 7 = 2 × 22 × 0.35 = 15.4 m2

Cost = 15.4 × 28 = ₹431.20
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात ₹431.20 है।

व्यास = 70 सेमी = 0.7 मीटर

त्रिज्या = \(0.7\over2\) = 0.35 मीटर

ऊँचाई = 7 मीटर

वक्र पृष्ठीय क्षेत्रफल (CSA) = 2 × \(22\over7\) × 0.35 × 7 = 2 × 22 × 0.35 = 15.4 मीटर2

लागत = 15.4 × 28 = ₹431.20

4.question_en: If \({1 \over 1+ tan\theta} + {1 \over 1- tan\theta}\) = 4, 0° < θ < 90°, then what is the value of cosec θ + sec θ + sin θ?
4.question_hi: यदि \({1 \over 1+ tan\theta} + {1 \over 1- tan\theta}\) = 4, 0° < θ < 90°, तो cosec θ + sec θ + sin θ का मान क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. \({3+4 \sqrt{2}\over \sqrt{6}}\).

\({1 \over 1+ tan\theta} + {1 \over 1- tan\theta}\) = 4

⇒ \({1- tan\theta+1+ tan\theta \over 1- tan^2\theta} \) = 4

⇒ \({2\over 1- tan^2\theta} \) = 4

⇒ 1 - tan2θ = \(1\over2\)

⇒ tan2θ = \(1\over2\)

⇒ tanθ = \(1\over\sqrt2\) = \(P\over B\)

⇒ H2 = 12 + \((\sqrt2)^2\)

⇒ H = \(\sqrt3\)

⇒ cosec θ + sec θ + sin θ

⇒ \(\sqrt3\) + \(\sqrt3\over\sqrt2\) + \(1\over\sqrt3\) = \({3+4 \sqrt{2}\over \sqrt{6}}\)
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात \({3+4 \sqrt{2}\over \sqrt{6}}\) है।

\({1 \over 1+ tan\theta} + {1 \over 1- tan\theta}\) = 4

⇒ \({1- tan\theta+1+ tan\theta \over 1- tan^2\theta} \) = 4

⇒ \({2\over 1- tan^2\theta} \) = 4

⇒ 1 - tan2θ = \(1\over2\)

⇒ tan2θ = \(1\over2\)

⇒ tanθ = \(1\over\sqrt2\) = \(P\over B\)

⇒ H2 = 12 + \((\sqrt2)^2\)

⇒ H = \(\sqrt3\)

⇒ cosec θ + sec θ + sin θ

⇒ \(\sqrt3\) + \(\sqrt3\over\sqrt2\) + \(1\over\sqrt3\) = \({3+4 \sqrt{2}\over \sqrt{6}}\)

4.question_en: The average weight of P, Q, and R is 57 kg. If the average weight of Q and R is 60 kg and that of R and P is 59 kg, then the weight (in kg) of R is:
4.question_hi: P, Q और R का औसत वज़न 57 किग्रा है। यदि Q और R का औसत वज़न 60 किग्रा है और R और P का औसत वज़न 59 किग्रा है, तो R का वज़न (किग्रा में) क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 3 i.e. 67.

P + Q + R = 57 × 3 = 171 kg....(1)

Q + R = 60 × 2 = 120 kg....(2)

R + P = 59 × 2 = 118 kg....(3)

Now,

Add equations 2 and 3

⇒ Q + R + R + P = 120 + 118

⇒ P + Q + 2R = 238 kg

⇒ R = (P + Q + 2R) - (P + Q + R)

⇒ R = 238 - 171 = 67 Kg
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 3 अर्थात 67 है।

P + Q + R = 57 × 3 = 171 किग्रा....(1)

Q + R = 60 × 2 = 120 किग्रा....(2)

R + P = 59 × 2 = 118 किग्रा....(3)

अब,

समीकरण 2 और 3 को जोड़ें

⇒ Q + R + R + P = 120 + 118

⇒ P + Q + 2R = 238 किग्रा

⇒ R = (P + Q + 2R) - (P + Q + R)

⇒ R = 238 - 171 = 67 किग्रा

4.question_en: If \(x^2 - \sqrt {13} x+ 1=0\), then (x3 + x-3) is equal to:
4.question_hi: यदि \(x^2 = \sqrt {13} x+ 1\), तो (x3 + x-3) बराबर है:
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. \(10\sqrt {13} \).

\(x^2 - \sqrt {13} x+ 1=0\)

x2 + 1 = \(\sqrt13\)x

Divide both sides by x

⇒ x + \(1\over x\) = \(\sqrt13\)x

⇒ (x3 + x-3) = (x3 + \(1\over x^3\))

⇒ (\(\sqrt13\))3 - 3 × \(\sqrt13\) 

⇒ 13\(\sqrt13\) - 3\(\sqrt13\) = 10\(\sqrt13\)
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात \(10\sqrt {13} \) है।

 \(x^2 - \sqrt {13} x+ 1=0\)

x2 + 1 = \(\sqrt13\)x

दोनों पक्षों को x से विभाजित करें

⇒ x + \(1\over x\) = \(\sqrt13\)x

⇒ (x3 + x-3) = (x3 + \(1\over x^3\))

⇒ (\(\sqrt13\))3 - 3 × \(\sqrt13\) 

⇒ 13\(\sqrt13\) - 3\(\sqrt13\) = 10\(\sqrt13\)

4.question_en: A type has 3 punctures. The first puncture alone would have made the tyre flat in 14 minutes, the second alone would have done it in 28 minutes, the third alone would have done it in 56 minutes. If air leaks out at a constant rate, how long (in minutes) does it take for all the punctures together to make the tyre flat?
4.question_hi: एक प्रकार के टायर में तीन पंक्चर होते हैं। पहला पंक्चर अकेले टायर को 14 मिनट में पंक्चर कर देता, दूसरा पंक्चर अकेले टायर को 28 मिनट में पंक्चर कर देता, और तीसरा पंक्चर अकेले टायर को 56 मिनट में पंक्चर कर देता। अगर हवा एक समान दर से बाहर निकलती रहे, तो सभी पंक्चर मिलकर टायर को पंक्चर करने में कितना समय (मिनटों में) लगेगा?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 8.

LCM(14, 28, 56) = 56

The efficiency of first puncture = 56/14 = 4

The efficiency of second puncture = 56/28 = 2

The efficiency of third puncture = 56/56 = 1

Time taken = \(56\over4+2+1\) = \(56\over7\) = 8 minutes
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 8 है।

​लघुत्तम समापवर्त्य (14, 28, 56) = 56

पहले पंचर की दक्षता = 56/14 = 4

दूसरे पंचर की दक्षता = 56/28 = 2

तीसरे पंचर की दक्षता = 56/56 = 1

लगा समय = \(56\over4+2+1\) = \(56\over7\) = 8 मिनट

4.question_en: On selling an article for ₹246.80, the gain is 20% more than the amount of loss incurred on selling it for ₹216. If the article is sold for ₹320.75, then what is the percentage (correct to one decimal place) profit/loss?
4.question_hi: एक वस्तु को ₹246.80 में बेचने पर, लाभ ₹216 में बेचने पर हुई हानि से 20% अधिक है। यदि वस्तु को ₹320.75 में बेचा जाता है, तो लाभ/हानि प्रतिशत (दशमलव के एक स्थान तक सही) क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. Profit of 39.4%.

Let CP = x

Loss = x – 216

Gain = 246.80 – x

Gain = 1.2 × Loss

⇒ 246.80 – x = 1.2(x – 216)

⇒ 246.80 – x = 1.2x – 259.20

⇒ 246.80 + 259.20 = 1.2x + x

⇒ 506 = 2.2x

⇒ x = 230

Profit = 320.75 – 230 = 90.75

% Profit = \(90.75 \over 230\) × 100 = 39.4%
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 अर्थात 39.4% का लाभ है।

​मान लीजिए क्रय मूल्य = x

हानि = x – 216

लाभ = 246.80 – x

लाभ = 1.2 × हानि

⇒ 246.80 – x = 1.2(x – 216)

⇒ 246.80 – x = 1.2x – 259.20

⇒ 246.80 + 259.20 = 1.2x + x

⇒ 506 = 2.2x

⇒ x = 230

लाभ = 320.75 – 230 = 90.75

% लाभ = \(90.75 \over 230\) × 100 = 39.4%

4.question_en: If the 9-digit number 45069x4y8 is divisible by 44, then what is the value of (x – 2y) for the minimum value of y?
4.question_hi: यदि 9-अंकीय संख्या 45069 x4y8, 44 से विभाज्य है, तो y के न्यूनतम मान के लिए (x – 2y) का मान क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. 3.

44 = 11 × 4

Divisibility rule of 4: the last two digits are divisible by 4

⇒ y8 ÷ 4

⇒ y = 0 [minimum]

Divisibility rule of 11: If the difference between the sum of its digits at odd places and the sum of its digits at even places is either 0 or divisible by 11

⇒ (4 + 0 + 9 + 4 + 8) - (5 + 6 + x + 0)

⇒ 25 - 11 - x = 0, 11

⇒ 14 - x = 0, 11

⇒ x = 3

⇒ (x – 2y) = (3 - 2 × 0) = 3
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात 3 है।

44 = 11 × 4

4 का विभाज्यता नियम: अंतिम दो अंक 4 से विभाज्य हैं

⇒ y8 ÷ 4

⇒ y = 0 [न्यूनतम]

11 का विभाज्यता नियम: यदि विषम स्थानों पर इसके अंकों के योग और सम स्थानों पर इसके अंकों के योग का अंतर 0 है या 11 से विभाज्य है

⇒ (4 + 0 + 9 + 4 + 8) - (5 + 6 + x + 0)

⇒ 25 - 11 - x = 0, 11

⇒ 14 - x = 0, 11

⇒ x = 3

⇒ (x – 2y) = (3 - 2 × 0) = 3

4.question_en: The savings of Surbhi are 16% of her expenditure. If her income increases by 35% and the expenditure increases by 38%, then by what percentage do her savings increase/decrease?
4.question_hi: सुरभि की बचत उसके व्यय का 16% है। यदि उसकी आय में 35% की वृद्धि होती है और व्यय में 38% की वृद्धि होती है, तो उसकी बचत में कितने प्रतिशत की वृद्धि/कमी होगी?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. Increase by 16.25%.

Let expenditure = 100

Then savings = 16% of 100 = 16

So, income = 100 + 16 = 116

Now, income increases by 35%:

New income = 116 × 1.35 = 156.6

Expenditure increases by 38%:

New expenditure = 100 × 1.38 = 138

New savings = 156.6 – 138 = 18.6

Change in savings = 18.6 – 16 = 2.6

% change = \(2.6 \over 16\) × 100 = 16.25%
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 16.25% की वृद्धि है।

​मान लीजिए व्यय = 100

तो बचत = 100 का 16% = 16

अतः, आय = 100 + 16 = 116

अब, आय में 35% की वृद्धि होती है:

नई आय = 116 × 1.35 = 156.6

व्यय में 38% की वृद्धि होती है:

नया व्यय = 100 × 1.38 = 138

नई बचत = 156.6 – 138 = 18.6

बचत में परिवर्तन = 18.6 – 16 = 2.6

% परिवर्तन = \(2.6 \over 16\) × 100 = 16.25%

4.question_en: A sum of 36,000 is lent partly at 9% and the remaining at 7% per annum. If the yearly interest on the average is 8.5%, then the sum (in ₹) which is lent at 9% is:
4.question_hi: 36,000 की एक राशि आंशिक रूप से 9% और शेष 7% प्रति वर्ष की दर से उधार दी जाती है। यदि औसत वार्षिक ब्याज 8.5% है, तो 9% पर उधार दी गई राशि (₹ में) क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1 i.e. 27,000.

So, 9% part = \({3\over4}\times36000\) = ₹27,000
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात 27,000 है।

तो, 9% हिस्सा = \({3\over4}\times36000\) = ₹27,000

4.question_en: In equilateral ΔABC, E is a point on side AC such that AE = AD, where D is the midpoint of BC. What is the measure of ∠EDC?
4.question_hi: समबाहु Δ ABC में, E भुजा AC पर एक बिंदु इस प्रकार है कि AE = AD है, जहाँ D, BC का मध्य-बिंदु है। ∠EDC का माप क्या है?
4.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 15˚.

⇒ ∠BAD = ∠DAC = \(60\over2\) = 30°

ΔAED, AE = AD

⇒ ∠ADE = ∠AED

⇒ ∠AED + ∠EDA + ∠DAE = 180°

⇒ 30° + 2 × ∠ADE = 180°

⇒ ∠ADE = 75°

⇒ ∠EDC = 90° - ∠ADE

⇒ 90° - 75° = 15°
4.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 अर्थात 15˚ है।

⇒ ∠BAD = ∠DAC = \(60\over2\) = 30°

ΔAED, AE = AD

⇒ ∠ADE = ∠AED

⇒ ∠AED + ∠EDA + ∠DAE = 180°

⇒ 30° + 2 × ∠ADE = 180°

⇒ ∠ADE = 75°

⇒ ∠EDC = 90° - ∠ADE

⇒ 90° - 75° = 15°

5.question_en:
Which two numbers should be interchanged to make the given equation correct?

68 + 85 - 15 ÷ 5 × 3 = 32
5.question_hi:
दिए गए समीकरण को सही बनाने के लिए किन दो संख्याओं को परस्पर बदलना चाहिए?

68 + 85 - 15 ÷ 5 × 3 = 32
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1, i.e., 85 and 15.

Given equation: 68 + 85 - 15 ÷ 5 × 3 = 32

After interchanging the numbers:

68 + 15 - (85 ÷ 5) × 3 = 32

⇒ 68 + 15 - (17 × 3) = 32

⇒ (68 + 15) - 51 = 32

⇒ 83 - 51 = 32

⇒ 32 = 32
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 है, अर्थात 85 और 15।

दिया गया समीकरण: 68 + 85 - 15 ÷ 5 × 3 = 32

संख्याओं को आपस में बदलने पर:

68 + 15 - (85 ÷ 5) × 3 = 32

⇒ 68 + 15 - (17 × 3) = 32

⇒ (68 + 15) - 51 = 32

⇒ 83 - 51 = 32

⇒ 32 = 32

5.question_en: Four letter-clusters have been given, out of which three are alike in some manner and one is different. Select the letter-cluster that is different.
5.question_hi: चार अक्षर-समूह दिए गए हैं, जिनमें से तीन किसी न किसी रूप में समान हैं और एक भिन्न है। उस अक्षर-समूह का चयन कीजिए जो भिन्न है।
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2, i.e., KMOP.

Logic: 1st letter + 2 = 2nd letter, 2nd letter + 2 = 3rd letter, 3rd letter + 2 = 4th letter

All follow the same logic except KMOP,

KMOP → K + 2 M, M + 2 = O, O + 2 = Q ≠ P
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 है, अर्थात KMOP.

तर्क: पहला अक्षर + 2 = दूसरा अक्षर, दूसरा अक्षर + 2 = तीसरा अक्षर, तीसरा अक्षर + 2 = चौथा अक्षर

KMOP को छोड़कर सभी समान तर्क का पालन करते हैं,

KMOP → K + 2 M, M + 2 = O, O + 2 = Q ≠ P

5.question_en: In a certain code language, 'PERMIT' is coded as ‘1651813920’. How will 'CLOSED' be coded in that language?

5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1, i.e., 312151954.

Logic: The positional value of letters

'PERMIT' is coded as ‘1651813920’

P = 16, E = 5, R = 18, M = 13, I = 9, T = 20

Similarly, 'CLOSED' is coded as 312151954

C = 3, L = 12, O = 15, S = 19, E = 5, D = 4
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 1 अर्थात 312151954 है।

तर्क: अक्षरों का स्थानीय मान

'PERMIT' को '1651813920' के रूप में कोडित किया गया है।

P = 16, E = 5, R = 18, M = 13, I = 9, T = 20

इसी प्रकार, 'CLOSED' को 312151954 के रूप में कोडित किया गया है।

C = 3, L = 12, O = 15, S = 19, E = 5, D = 4

5.question_en: Three different positions of the same dice are shown, the six faces of which are indicated by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6. Select the number that will be on the face opposite to the one showing '5'.
5.question_hi: एक ही पासे की तीन अलग-अलग स्थितियाँ दर्शाई गई हैं, जिनके छह फलकों को 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 और 6 से दर्शाया गया है। उस संख्या का चयन करें जो '5' दर्शाने वाले फलक के विपरीत फलक पर होगी।
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. 6.

From dice 1st and 2nd we get 4 is common, so we write the numbers in a clockwise direction from 4:

Dice 1: 4 → 1 → 6

Dice 2: 4 → 3 →  5

Thus, the opposite of 5 is 6.
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 यानी 6 है।

पहले और दूसरे पासे से हमें 4 प्राप्त होता है, यह उभयनिष्ठ है, इसलिए हम संख्याओं को 4 से दक्षिणावर्त दिशा में लिखते हैं:

पासा 1:4 →1 →6

पासा 2: 4 → 3 → 5

इस प्रकार, 5 का विपरीत 6 है।

5.question_en:
Directions: Read the given statements and conclusions carefully. Assuming that the information given in the statements is true, even if it appears to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements.

Statements:

No restaurant is a shop.

All shops are schools.

All parks are shops.

Conclusions:

I. Some schools are parks.

II. Some parks are restaurants.

III. Some shops are parks.
5.question_hi:
निर्देश: दिए गए कथनों और निष्कर्षों को ध्यानपूर्वक पढ़ें। यह मानते हुए कि कथनों में दी गई जानकारी सत्य है, भले ही वह सामान्यतः ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न प्रतीत होती हो, निर्णय कीजिए कि दिए गए निष्कर्षों में से कौन सा/से निष्कर्ष कथनों का तार्किक रूप से अनुसरण करता है/करते हैं।

कथन:

कोई भी रेस्टोरेंट दुकान नहीं है।

सभी दुकानें स्कूल हैं।

सभी पार्क दुकानें हैं।

निष्कर्ष:

I. कुछ स्कूल पार्क हैं।

II. कुछ पार्क रेस्टोरेंट हैं।

III. कुछ दुकानें पार्क हैं।
5.option_hi_1: निष्कर्ष I, II और III अनुसरण करते हैं।
5.option_hi_2: निष्कर्ष II और III दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं।
5.option_hi_3: निष्कर्ष I और II दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं।
5.option_hi_4: निष्कर्ष I और III दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं।
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. Both conclusions I and III follow.

Conclusions:

I. Some schools are parks → Follows (All parks are shops and all shops are schools, so definitely some schools are parks.)

II. Some parks are restaurants → Does not follow (As all parks are shops and no restaurant is a shop, so some parks are restaurants is definitely false.)

III. Some shops are parks → Follows (If all parks are shops, then definitely, some shops are parks.)
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 है अर्थात निष्कर्ष I और III दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं।

निष्कर्ष:

I. कुछ स्कूल पार्क हैं → अनुसरण करता है (सभी पार्क दुकानें हैं और सभी दुकानें स्कूल हैं, इसलिए निश्चित रूप से कुछ स्कूल पार्क हैं।)

II. कुछ पार्क रेस्टोरेंट हैं → अनुसरण नहीं करता (चूंकि सभी पार्क दुकानें हैं और कोई भी रेस्टोरेंट दुकान नहीं है, इसलिए कुछ पार्क रेस्टोरेंट हैं, यह निश्चित रूप से गलत है।)

III. कुछ दुकानें पार्क हैं → अनुसरण करता है (यदि सभी पार्क दुकानें हैं, तो निश्चित रूप से, कुछ दुकानें पार्क हैं।)

II. Some boats are roses.
5.question_hi:
निर्देश: दिए गए कथनों और निष्कर्षों को ध्यानपूर्वक पढ़ें। यह मानते हुए कि कथनों में दी गई जानकारी सत्य है, भले ही वह सामान्यतः ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न प्रतीत होती हो, निर्णय कीजिए कि दिए गए निष्कर्षों में से कौन सा/से निष्कर्ष कथनों का तार्किक रूप से अनुसरण करता है/करते हैं।

कथन:

कुछ गुलाब नावें हैं।

सभी सुइयाँ नावें हैं।

निष्कर्ष:

I. कुछ नावें सुइयाँ हैं।

II. कुछ नावें गुलाब हैं।
5.option_hi_2: निष्कर्ष I और II दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं
5.option_hi_3: या तो निष्कर्ष I या II अनुसरण करता है।
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. Both conclusions I and II follow.

Conclusions:

I. Some boats are needles → Follows (All needles are boats, so definitely some boats are needles.)

II. Some boats are roses → Follows (Some roses are boats, so some boats are roses is true.)
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 है अर्थात निष्कर्ष I और II दोनों अनुसरण करते हैं।

निष्कर्ष:

I. कुछ नावें सुइयाँ हैं → अनुसरण करता है (सभी सुइयाँ नावें हैं, इसलिए निश्चित रूप से कुछ नावें सुइयाँ हैं।)

II. कुछ नावें गुलाब हैं →अनुसरण करता है (कुछ गुलाब नावें हैं, इसलिए कुछ नावें गुलाब हैं, यह सत्य है।)

5.question_en: In a certain code language, 'VIEWER' is written as ‘XGCYCT’ and ‘DOER’ is written as ‘FMCT’. How will 'FLAGSHIP' be written in that language?
5.question_hi: एक निश्चित कूट भाषा में, 'VIEWER' को 'XGCYCT' और 'DOER' को 'FMCT' लिखा जाता है। उस भाषा में 'FLAGSHIP' कैसे लिखा जाएगा?
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2 i.e. HNYIUJGR.

Consonants = + 2; Vowels = - 2

'VIEWER' is written as ‘XGCYCT’

V + 2 = X, I - 2 = G, E - 2 = C, W + 2 = Y, E - 2 = C, R + 2 = T

‘DOER’ is written as ‘FMCT’

D + 2 = F, O - 2 = M, E - 2 = C, R + 2 = T

Similarly, 'FLAGSHIP' is written as HNYIUJGR

F + 2 = H, L + 2 = N, A - 2 = Y, G + 2 = I, S + 2 = U, H + 2 = J, I - 2 = G, P + 2 = R
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 2 यानी HNYIUJGR है।

व्यंजन = +2; स्वर =-2

'VIEWER' को 'XGCYCT' लिखा जाता है

V + 2 = X, I - 2 = G, E - 2 = C, W + 2 = Y, E - 2 = C, R + 2 = T

'DOER' को 'FMCT' लिखा जाता है

D + 2 = F, O - 2 = M, E - 2 = C, R + 2 = T

इसी तरह, 'FLAGSHIP' को HNYIUJGR लिखा जाता है

F + 2 = H, L + 2 = N, A - 2 = Y, G + 2 = I, S + 2 = U, H + 2 = J, I - 2 = G, P + 2 = R

16 : 64 :: 36 : ? :: 20 : 100
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4, i.e., 324.

16 : 64 → (16 ÷ 4) × 16 = 64

20 : 100 → (20 ÷ 4) × 20 = 64

Similarly, 36:? → (36 ÷ 4) × 36 = 324

5.question_en: A = B means ‘A is the father of B’ A # B means ‘A is the mother of B’ A @ B means ‘A is the son of B’ If Q = K # D @ H = R, then how is Q related to H?

5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. Father-in-law.

Hence, Q is the Father-in-law of H.

अतः, Q, H का ससुर है।

5.question_en: Seven friends K, L, M, N, O, P and Q are sitting in a straight line all facing the same direction. N is sitting at one of the corners. O is fourth to the right of Q. Only three persons are sitting between M and L. Q is to the immediate left of P. O is second to the right of K. Only four persons are sitting between N and M. What is L’s position?
5.question_hi: सात मित्र K, L, M, N, O, P और Q एक सीधी रेखा में एक ही दिशा के सम्मुख बैठे हैं। N किसी एक कोने पर बैठा है। O, Q के दाईं ओर चौथा है। M और L के बीच केवल तीन व्यक्ति बैठे हैं। Q, P के ठीक बाईं ओर है। O, K के दाईं ओर दूसरा है। N और M के बीच केवल चार व्यक्ति बैठे हैं। L का स्थान क्या है?
5.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4 i.e. Second to the left of P.

Hence, L is Second to the left of P.
5.solution_hi:
सही उत्तर विकल्प 4 है अर्थात P के बाईं ओर दूसरा।

अतः, L, P के बायीं ओर दूसरा है।

2.comprehensive_en:
Read the given passage and answer the questions that follow. Mani was beginning to look worried by the thought of the examinations and dogged the steps of the school clerk.

There was a general belief in the school that the clerk knew all the question papers of all the classes. One day Mani went to the clerk’s house and laid a neat bundle containing fresh brinjals at his feet. The clerk was pleased and took Mani in and seated him on a stool. The clerk looked extremely amiable and Mani felt that he could ask anything at that moment and get it. The clerk was murmuring something about his cat, a lank ill fed thing, that was nestling close to him. Most of what he was saying did not enter Mani’s head. He was waiting to open the topic of question papers. The clerk had meanwhile passed from cats to eye-flies; but it made little difference to Mani, who was waiting for the other to pause for breath to launch his attack. ‘You must never let these eye-flies buzz near your eyes. All cases of eyesore can be traced to it. When you get eyesore, the only thing you can do is to take a slice of raw onion…' continued the clerk. Mani realised that the other would not stop and butted in, ‘There is only a week more for the examinations sir……’ The clerk was slightly puzzled : ‘Yes. Indeed, a week more …… Mani tried to look pathetic. ‘You see, sir, I am so worried, I don’t sleep at nights, thinking of the examination …… ’ If you could possibly tell me something important….. I have such a lot to study. I don’t want to study unnecessary things that may not be necessary for the examination. The clerk understood what he was driving at, but advised, ‘Just read all your portions and you will pass.’ Mani asked bluntly, ‘Please tell me, sir, what questions are we getting for our examination?’ The clerk denied having any knowledge of the question papers. Mani flattered him by asking, if he did not know the questions, who else would. By just a little more flattery the clerk was moved to give what Mani believed to be valuable hints. In spite of the fact that he did not know what the first form texts were, the clerk ventured to advise ‘you must pay particular attention to Geography. May be you will have to practice map-drawing a lot. And in Arithmetic make it a point to solve at least five problems every day and you will be able to tackle Arithmetic easily.’ ‘And what about English?’ asked Mani. ‘Oh, don’t worry about that. You must read all the important lessons again and if you have time, yet again and that will be ample.’ These answers satisfied Mani greatly. On his way home, he smiled to himself and said that the four annas he had invested on brinjals was not after all a waste.

2.solution_en:

Given word: Pathetic
Meaning: Causing feelings of pity, sadness, or sorrow.

Synonym: Miserable
Meaning: Extremely unhappy, uncomfortable, or full of distress.
Example: He looked miserable after failing the exam.

Meaning of the other options:

Innocent: Not guilty; free from wrongdoing.
Ignorant: Lacking knowledge or awareness.

2.question_en: According to the clerk, what was the remedy for the eyesore?
2.comprehensive_en: Read the given passage and answer the questions that follow. Mani was beginning to look worried by the thought of the examinations and dogged the steps of the school clerk. There was a general belief in the school that the clerk knew all the question papers of all the classes. One day Mani went to the clerk’s house and laid a neat bundle containing fresh brinjals at his feet. The clerk was pleased and took Mani in and seated him on a stool. The clerk looked extremely amiable and Mani felt that he could ask anything at that moment and get it. The clerk was murmuring something about his cat, a lank ill fed thing, that was nestling close to him. Most of what he was saying did not enter Mani’s head. He was waiting to open the topic of question papers. The clerk had meanwhile passed from cats to eye-flies; but it made little difference to Mani, who was waiting for the other to pause for breath to launch his attack. ‘You must never let these eye-flies buzz near your eyes. All cases of eyesore can be traced to it. When you get eyesore, the only thing you can do is to take a slice of raw onion…' continued the clerk. Mani realised that the other would not stop and butted in, ‘There is only a week more for the examinations sir……’ The clerk was slightly puzzled : ‘Yes. Indeed, a week more …… Mani tried to look pathetic. ‘You see, sir, I am so worried, I don’t sleep at nights, thinking of the examination …… ’ If you could possibly tell me something important….. I have such a lot to study. I don’t want to study unnecessary things that may not be necessary for the examination. The clerk understood what he was driving at, but advised, ‘Just read all your portions and you will pass.’ Mani asked bluntly, ‘Please tell me, sir, what questions are we getting for our examination?’ The clerk denied having any knowledge of the question papers. Mani flattered him by asking, if he did not know the questions, who else would. By just a little more flattery the clerk was moved to give what Mani believed to be valuable hints. In spite of the fact that he did not know what the first form texts were, the clerk ventured to advise ‘you must pay particular attention to Geography. May be you will have to practice map-drawing a lot. And in Arithmetic make it a point to solve at least five problems every day and you will be able to tackle Arithmetic easily.’ ‘And what about English?’ asked Mani. ‘Oh, don’t worry about that. You must read all the important lessons again and if you have time, yet again and that will be ample.’ These answers satisfied Mani greatly. On his way home, he smiled to himself and said that the four annas he had invested on brinjals was not after all a waste.

2.question_en:
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.

The work cannot be completed on time ______ you work for longer hours.
2.question_hi:
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.

The work cannot be completed on time ______ you work for longer hours.
2.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 4, i.e. unless.

Context: The sentence talks about a condition where work will not be completed unless longer hours are worked. So, a conditional word is needed.

Meaning of the words:

  • Even – used for emphasis or surprise (not suitable here)

  • Because – shows reason (not a condition)

  • Since – also shows reason or time

  • Unless – means “if not” or “except if”, used to show a condition

Correct word: Unless is the correct word because the sentence is stating a condition that must be fulfilled.

Reason: The structure of the sentence is conditional. It is saying that the work will not be completed if you don’t work for longer hours. This meaning is best expressed using unless.

Final Sentence: The work cannot be completed on time unless you work for longer hours.

Hence, the chosen option is correct.

2.question_en:
The following sentence has been divided into parts. One of them may contain an error. Select the part that contains the error from the given options. If you don’t find any error, mark ‘No error’ as your answer.

She wanted telling her grandfather / her marks but / he had gone for a walk.

The following sentence has been divided into parts. One of them may contain an error. Select the part that contains the error from the given options. If you don’t find any error, mark ‘No error’ as your answer.

She wanted telling her grandfather / her marks but / he had gone for a walk.
2.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2, i.e. She wanted telling her grandfather.

Error concept: Use of verb form 
What is wrong: The phrase "wanted telling" is grammatically incorrect.

Grammatical concept: After the verb "want", we use the infinitive form (to + verb), not the -ing form of the verb.

Incorrectness of the concept in context: Here, "telling" is in the -ing form, which is wrong after "wanted".

How to correct: We should use "to tell" instead of "telling".

Correct phrase/ correction: She wanted to tell her grandfather

Final sentence: She wanted to tell her grandfather her marks, but he had gone for a walk.

Hence, the chosen option is correct.

2.question_en:
Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. If there is no need to substitute it, select ‘No substitution required’.

Anurag said that he is being fined by a policeman for not wearing a mask last evening.
2.question_hi:
Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. If there is no need to substitute it, select ‘No substitution required’.

Anurag said that he is being fined by a policeman for not wearing a mask last evening.
2.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 2, i.e. had been fined.

Error concept: Tense of the verb 
What is wrong: The sentence uses "is being fined", which is in the present continuous passive tense. But the sentence mentions "last evening", indicating past time.

Grammatical concept: For actions that happened in the past and were completed, we should use the past perfect passive form like "had been fined".

Incorrectness of the concept in context: Since "last evening" is in the past, "is being fined" (present tense) does not fit correctly.

How to correct: Replace "is being fined" with "had been fined" to match the past time.

Correct phrase/ correction: Anurag said that he had been fined by a policeman for not wearing a mask last evening.

Hence, the chosen option is correct.

2.question_en:
Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph.

A. My husband would not be back until late and I decided to settle down in a comfortable chair and read a book.

B. I put the children to bed early and prepared some coffee.

C. It had been a tiring day and I was looking forward to a quiet evening.

D. Soon I was sitting comfortably with a cup of coffee and the book.
2.question_hi:
Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph.

A. My husband would not be back until late and I decided to settle down in a comfortable chair and read a book.

B. I put the children to bed early and prepared some coffee.

C. It had been a tiring day and I was looking forward to a quiet evening.

D. Soon I was sitting comfortably with a cup of coffee and the book.
2.solution_en:
The correct answer is option 1, i.e. CBDA.

Logical flow
The paragraph begins with C, which sets the situation — the speaker is tired and wants a quiet evening.
Next is B, where she puts the children to bed and prepares coffee, which naturally follows after deciding to relax.
Then comes A, where she decides to settle down with a book.
Finally, D describes the result — she is comfortably sitting with coffee and the book.

Correct sequence: C → B → A → D

Final Sentence/Passage:
It had been a tiring day, and I was looking forward to a quiet evening. I put the children to bed early and prepared some coffee. My husband would not be back until late and I decided to settle down in a comfortable chair and read a book. Soon I was sitting comfortably with a cup of coffee and the book.

Hence, the chosen option is correct.
